description.content: Create, validate, and manage ARM/Bicep template deployments

item.name: Microsoft Bicep Create or update a deployment

request.name: Microsoft Bicep Create or update a deployment

description.content: Deploys resources to a resource group using an ARM/Bicep template. You can provide the template directly or link to a template URI or Template Spec.

query.description: (Required) The API version to use for this operation

variable.description: (Required) The name of the resource group. The name is case insensitive.

response.name: Deployment updated successfully

Azure Resource Manager Deployments REST API used by Microsoft Bicep to deploy infrastructure as code templates. Provides operations for creating, validating, and managing ARM/Bicep template deployments at resource group, subscription, management group, and tenant scopes.
